time_unit.evidence_statement: Legacy APB1da dt, ttime and exported .dat Time are in minutes.

case_equivalence.reason: The files share the BUZ67D PKN lineage, but fixture duration, reduced sampling and migrated-case review caveats prevent declaring SAME_CASE equivalence.

better_pair_search.reason: Only buz67d_pkn.yaml is present under cases/lot_tese_migrated; other legacy .dat outputs do not have a clearer migrated YAML pair in this phase.

allowed_next_steps: Use time_s = Time_raw * 60.0 as a documented unit conversion.
Build tests that assert the Level 1 gate remains closed until case equivalence evidence is added.
Search for additional metadata proving case and duration equivalence.
caveats: The time unit is resolved by direct author context, not by a unit declaration in the legacy .dat file.
The converted legacy fixture spans 0..750 s while the reduced modern fixture spans 0..420 s.
The gate does not validate pressure, fracture opening, damage, rupture or stress equivalence.
The gate does not compare tensor fields or hoop-state classifications.
